=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
1992.04.13 
Sydney, New South Wales 
Australia,State Theatre

FLAC files  labelled "Les Kokay Australia 92-3"


CD1

1 Don't Let Your Deal Go Down 2 Lay Lady Lay 3 Everything Is Broken 4 Just Like A Woman 5 Tangled Up In Blue 6 She Belongs To Me 7 Maggie's Farm 8 Love Minus Zero - No Limit (acoustic) 9 Little Moses (acoustic) 10 Gates Of Eden (acoustic),

CD2

1 Mr. Tambourine Man (acoustic w band) 2 Cat's In The Well 3 Idiot Wind 4 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band) 5 Highway 61 Revisited 6 Absolutely Sweet Marie 7 All Along The Watchtower 8 Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) 


8, 9, 18  Bob Dylan (acoustic guitar & vocal).
4, 5, 8, 9, 11, 14, 15 16, 18  Bob Dylan harmonica.
10  acoustic with the band except drums.
11, 14  acoustic with the band.
5, 14  Bucky Baxter (mandolin).
10, 11  Bucky Baxter (dobro or acoustic slide).
15  Bucky Baxter (electric slide guitar).

BobTalk:
Thanks everybody! For all you curious people out there: that was called Lay Lady Lay! That was off one of my own records for those of you who don't know it.

This is off my new, sort of my new record. Another one of my animal songs called Cat's In The Well.
